author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن مكرم بن علي، أبو الفضل، جمال الدين ابن منظور الأنصاري الرويفعي الإفريقي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent linguist and lexicographer, known for his comprehensive dictionary Lisan al-Arab.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A seminal work in Arabic lexicography, synthesizing earlier dictionaries and serving as a foundational reference.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most important Arabic dictionaries, widely consulted for its comprehensiveness and scholarly rigor.
